problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Photocatalytic. Photocatalytic oxidation under visible light directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
